title: Surgeon Vacancy at Roche India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Roche India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Roche India in Surat offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Roche India:
Roche India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Roche India!
